title: NetworkAttachmentDefinition
description: NetworkAttachmentDefinition documents network attachment definition material for Multus in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an entity page for the networking-stack class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Network 설정하기, Node별 Network 설정하기, and Pod annotation으로 네트워크 할당하기, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include multi-homed, cni, networkattachmentdefinition, network-attachment-definition, and infrastructure, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / networking / multus / network-attachment-definition, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
